    A

    AbstractFileRepository<ID,E> - Class in org.example.repository
    Abstract class representing a repository of entities stored in a file.
    AbstractService<ID,E> - Class in org.example.service
    Abstract base class for service-layer implementations.
    AbstractService(Repository) - Constructor for class org.example.service.AbstractService
    Creates an AbstractService with the given Repository
    add(E) - Method in class org.example.repository.AbstractFileRepository
     
    add(E) - Method in class org.example.repository.InMemoryRepository
    Adds a new entity to the repository.
    add(E) - Method in interface org.example.repository.Repository
    Adds a new entity to the repository.
    add(String...) - Method in class org.example.service.FriendshipService
    Adds a new friendship between two users.
    add(String...) - Method in interface org.example.service.Service
    Adds a new entity using the provided fields.
    add(String...) - Method in class org.example.service.UserService
    Adds a new user of type Duck or Person with the given fields.
    addFriendship() - Method in class org.example.ui.Console
    Prompts for two user IDs and creates a friendship between them.
    addUser() - Method in class org.example.ui.Console
    Prompts the user to input information and adds a new Person or Duck.
